_readme: The full cockpit voice pack, one entry per panel control. Run `python3 generate_sounds.py` to render these with YOUR crew's names via the ElevenLabs API. Tokens: {c1}/{c2}/{c3} = first three crew names from config.json, {ship} = ship_name_spoken. 'code' = the evdev button code on a WINWING PTO2 (matches mapping.json); ids double as the sound filenames panel_web.py plays.
voice_hint: We used a booming movie-trailer narrator voice from the ElevenLabs voice library. Pick any voice you like in your ElevenLabs Voice Lab and pass --voice <id>, or set voice_id here.
style: Epic trailer read. Scale the drama per control: routine ops = calm authority, emergencies = full alarm.
notes: 709 is a LOOPING alarm that repeats until 289 (silence alarms) is pressed — see loop_codes in mapping.json.

entries.label: Landing Gear Up
entries.script: Landing gear, retracting. Hold on tight, crew. Captain {c1}, Commander {c2}, Specialist {c3} — the {ship} shuttle is climbing through the clouds and breaking for orbit. The great voyage of the {ship} begins... now.

entries.label: Landing Gear Down
entries.script: Landing gear, down and locked. Easy does it, {ship} crew. Touchdown sequence engaged. Welcome home, {c1}, {c2}, and {c3} — even if home today is a distant, uncharted world.

entries.label: Silence Emergency Alarms
entries.script: Emergency alarms, silenced. Deep breath, crew. Captain {c1} has the conn. All systems holding steady.

entries.label: Jettison (eject)
entries.script: Emergency jettison! Ejection sequence armed! {c2}, {c3} — brace for launch! Captain {c1}, punch us clear into open space! Caution: extreme danger!

entries.label: Extend Launch Bar
entries.script: Launch bar, extended. Steady, {c3} — guide us in. Docking thrusters firing. The {ship} shuttle is approaching the orbital station. Initiate docking sequence.

entries.label: Retract Launch Bar
entries.script: Launch bar, retracted. {c2}, release the clamps. Disconnecting from the station. The {ship} crew is free to navigate the open void.

entries.label: Landing/Taxi Lights On
entries.script: Landing and taxi lights, on. Light her up, {c1}. Mission Control has the {ship} on visual. Welcome back to Houston, crew.

entries.label: Landing/Taxi Lights Off
entries.script: Landing and taxi lights, off. Running silent and smooth. Enjoy the flight, {ship} crew — tonight, the galaxy is yours.

entries.label: Hook Bypass — Carrier
entries.script: Hook bypass, carrier mode. Tailhook armed, {c3}. Prepare for an arrested landing on the orbital carrier deck. Hold tight, crew.

entries.label: Hook Bypass — Field
entries.script: Hook bypass, field mode. Smooth runway ahead, {c2}. The {ship} shuttle is cleared for a gentle planetary touchdown.

entries.label: Probe Extend
entries.script: Refuel probe, extending. Careful now, {c1}. Locking onto the hydrogen fuel station at the moon base. Topping off the cells for the long voyage ahead.

entries.label: Probe Neutral
entries.script: Refuel probe, neutral. Holding position. Standing by, {ship} crew.

entries.label: Probe Emergency Disconnect
entries.script: Emergency probe disconnect! Break away, {c2} — break away! Fuel line rupture! Master caution — danger, danger!

entries.label: Anti-Skid On
entries.script: Anti-skid, engaged. Stabilizers locked. {c3}, plot the jump. The {ship} crew is preparing for hyper jump.

entries.label: Anti-Skid Off
entries.script: Anti-skid, disengaged. Hyper jump complete. Outstanding flying, crew. {c1} — where in the galaxy are we now?

entries.label: Half Flaps
entries.script: Flaps, half. Bracing for turbulent space, crew. Hold the line, {c2} — asteroid wash incoming.

entries.label: Full Flaps
entries.script: Flaps, full! Hard maneuver, {c3} — watch out for those meteors! The {ship} shuttle is threading the storm!

entries.label: Flaps Auto
entries.script: Flaps, automatic. Autopilot has the controls. Relax for a moment, {ship} crew — the ship's got this one.

entries.label: Emergency Hyper Jump Brake
entries.script: Emergency hyper jump brake! Critical fault in the hyper drive! All hands — {c1}, {c2}, {c3} — full reverse! Drop us out of warp, now!

entries.label: Jettison Alarm (loops)
entries.script: Warning! Jettison sequence active! Alert! Alert! {ship} crew, stand by your stations! Alert! Alert!

entries.label: Sel Jettison — Safe
entries.script: Jettison selector, safe. Nothing armed. All stores secure, {ship} crew. Stand easy.

entries.label: Sel Jettison — Left Fuel Cell
entries.script: Caution: left hydrogen fuel cell, armed for jettison. Confirm the order, Captain {c1}. Alert — alert.

entries.label: Sel Jettison — Right Fuel Cell
entries.script: Caution: right hydrogen fuel cell, armed for jettison. Confirm the order, {c2}. Standing by.

entries.label: Sel Jettison — Escape Pod
entries.script: Warning: {ship} escape pod, armed for launch! All crew — {c1}, {c2}, {c3} — confirm aboard before release! Alert! Alert!

entries.label: Sel Jettison — Life Stores
entries.script: Warning: food, water, and life-support stores armed for jettison. Emergency reserves only. Captain's authorization required. Use only in an extreme emergency.

entries.label: Hook In — Black Hole Loop
entries.script: Engaging the black hole hyper-loop! Everyone strap in — {c1}, {c2}, {c3} — gravimetric shear incoming! Approaching extreme light speed!

entries.label: Hook Out — Black Hole
entries.script: Exiting the black hole. Brace for a sudden stop, crew! {c3} — stabilize the gravity wells! Hold on tight!

entries.label: Hook Neutral
entries.script: Hook drive, neutral. Coasting steady. Catch your breath, {ship} crew.

entries.label: Master Engine Hyper Drive
entries.script: Master engine, online! Hydrogen fuel cells at full charge. Hyper drive spooling up. {c2} at the helm, {c3} on navigation, {c1} on power — the {ship} crew is go for hyper drive!

entries.label: Left Engine Hyper Drive On
entries.script: Left engine, hyper drive — ignition! Feel that power, crew!

entries.label: Right Engine Hyper Drive On
entries.script: Right engine, hyper drive — ignition! Both engines hot, Captain {c1}!

entries.label: Left Engine Hyper Drive Off
entries.script: Left engine, powering down. Easy, {c2}. Holding steady on the right.

entries.label: Right Engine Hyper Drive Off
entries.script: Right engine, powering down. All engines cold. Well flown, {ship} crew.

entries.label: Wing Spread
entries.script: Wings, spreading wide for extreme hyper drive! Maximum surface, {c3} — catch the solar winds!

entries.label: Wing Hold
entries.script: Wings, locked and held. Steady at warp speed, crew. The {ship} shuttle is screaming through the stars.

entries.label: Wing Fold
entries.script: Wings, folding for landing. Final approach, {ship} crew. Bring her home, Captain {c1}.
